ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user's email is verified */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "phone_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user's phone number is verified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the post is deleted */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was deleted */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a post */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post this version belongs to */,
  "version_content" TEXT /* Content of the post at this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the post */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the post to this version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_versions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is deleted */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was deleted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the comment */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create_post, edit_post, delete_post) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the activity occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being reported (optional) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported (optional) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the content */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_reports_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the category is associated with */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_categories_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_blocklist" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who blocked another user */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blocked user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blocklist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blocklist_blocked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
